main.subtitle: Global smooth scrolling. Press middle button and move.
main.hotkey_dialog.title: Set Shortcut
main.help.title: Feature Guide
main.help.html:
{speed_icon} Sensitivity Curve
Controls acceleration growth with distance from center.

{power_icon} Base Speed
Global speed multiplier for scrolling output.

{target_icon} Dead Zone
Distance from center before scrolling starts.

{move_icon} Horizontal Mode
Enable 360-degree movement for wide content.
main.toggle_horizontal.title: Horizontal Scroll
main.settings_failed.title: Failed
main.permission_denied.title: Permission Required
main.permission_denied.body: Failed to start global input hook service.
main.scroll_engine_failed.title: Scroll Engine Failed
main.scroll_engine_failed.body: Failed to start the scroll engine. FlowScroll cannot produce scrolling output in this session.
main.preset.delete_confirm_body: Delete preset '{name}'? This cannot be undone.
main.update.release_tooltip: A newer stable release is available: v{version}
main.update.dev_tooltip: You are using a development build. Latest stable release: v{version}
tab.presets.title: Presets
tab.author: GitHub | CyrilPeng
dialog.reverse.title: Scroll Direction
dialog.work.title: Work Mode
dialog.work.subtitle: Choose click-toggle or hold-to-activate. Keyboard and mouse are both supported.
dialog.work.mode_click_title: Click to enable / click again to disable
dialog.work.mode_hold_title: Hold to enable / release to disable
dialog.work.compat_mode: Compatibility mode (short tap does not trigger)
dialog.filter.title: App Filter Mode
dialog.filter.subtitle: Use blacklist/whitelist rules based on process name to control where FlowScroll is enabled.
dialog.filter.mode_global_desc: Enabled for all apps (still affected by fullscreen disable).
dialog.filter.mode_blacklist_desc: One process-name keyword per line. Matched apps are disabled.
dialog.filter.mode_whitelist_desc: One process-name keyword per line. Only matched apps are enabled.
dialog.filter.hint: Import from text file; one keyword per line. Use stable process-name fragments such as chrome, code, or potplayer.
dialog.filter.process_name_unavailable: The current environment cannot identify the process name, so process-based rules are temporarily unavailable. FlowScroll will fall back to window-title matching for the current foreground app.
dialog.inertia.title: Inertia Settings
dialog.inertia.subtitle: Tune glide feel after releasing activation key.
dialog.inertia.friction_desc: Higher value means longer glide time.
dialog.inertia.threshold_desc: Inertia starts only when release speed exceeds this value.
webdav.title: WebDAV Cloud Sync
webdav.keyring_unavailable_hint: System keyring is unavailable. The password will only be kept in memory for this session and will not be written to disk.
webdav.password_session_only:
System keyring is unavailable. The password is only stored in memory for this session.
You will need to enter it again next time.
webdav.saved_notice: WebDAV settings have been staged. Save the preset in the main window to persist them.
webdav.download_success: Configuration downloaded successfully. Restart the app or reload the preset to apply it.
webdav.download_failed:
Download failed. There may be no remote config file yet:
{error}
